about_description: Passionate and detail-oriented Software Engineer with 3+ years of professional experience specializing in Flutter cross-platform development. Proven track record of leading development teams, architecting scalable mobile applications, and delivering high-quality products using Clean Architecture, BLoC/Cubit patterns, and modern development practices. Experienced in full-stack development with a focus on user experience and performant code.
skills_languages: Dart, Kotlin, HTML, CSS, PHP, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, C++, SQL, Java
skills_frontend: Flutter, React.js, React Native, Vue.js, Next.js
exp_1_role: Lead Flutter Developer & Frontend Web Developer (Next.js)
exp_1_desc: Leading the development of the ICCP (Islamic Community Center of Potomac) mobile application frontend, providing the community with seamless access to prayer times, events, donations, and news feeds. As Team Lead and Code Reviewer, I oversee architectural decisions, enforce coding standards, and mentor developers. Built with Clean Architecture and Cubit for state management. Implemented Firebase Cloud Messaging for remote notifications and local notifications for daily prayer reminders. Additionally contributing as a Frontend Web Developer using Next.js.
exp_2_desc: Developed a cross-platform mobile application for Jeyad 360, an integrated Arabic platform for horse stable management. The app enables stable owners to manage horse care, administrative operations, and financial activities through a centralized digital solution. Built with Clean Architecture and Cubit for scalable state management.
exp_3_role: Lead Flutter Developer – Clean Architecture & BLoC
exp_3_desc: Led the creation of AutoPal, a cross-platform vehicle management application. As Team Lead and Code Reviewer, I oversee architectural decisions, enforce coding standards, and mentor developers. The codebase follows Clean Architecture with BLoC for robust state management. I coordinate sprint planning, conduct PR reviews, and drive continuous improvement.
exp_4_desc: Led the development of a cross-platform cash register application for the WindERP platform, targeting desktop and Android. Responsible for designing the application architecture, assigning tasks, and ensuring code quality. Handled core POS functionalities including sales processing, product scanning, inventory synchronization, and real-time transaction tracking. Implemented using MVVM and Provider.
exp_5_desc: Served as Project Manager and Mobile Developer for a medical appointment management application. Led the project from conception to delivery, coordinating features and timelines. Developed with Flutter, MVVM, and Provider. Features included appointment booking, calendar integration, doctor availability, and push notifications.
exp_6_role: Flutter Developer – Sports Tech / B2B Solutions
exp_6_desc: Developed a B2B football prediction application delivering real-time match forecasts, analytics, and scoring predictions. Supports dynamic content through RESTful API integration. Implemented MVVM architecture with Provider for state management.
exp_7_desc: Developed WindERP, a mobile ERP application targeting Android and iOS. Supported enterprise resource planning functionalities such as inventory management, sales tracking, and employee management. Followed MVVM architecture with Provider for state management.
exp_8_desc: Designed and developed a cross-platform mobile app for a high-end product marketplace using Flutter (mobile) and ReactJS (admin dashboard). Built a secure Node.js backend with RESTful APIs and MySQL. Implemented authentication, product filtering, push notifications, and payment processing. Applied MVVM with Provider.
exp_9_desc: Developed VisitMe, a mobile application for managing and scheduling meetings using Flutter. Consumed RESTful APIs for real-time data. Features included user authentication, meeting creation, notifications, and calendar integration.
exp_10_desc: Developed a web application to automate the parking violation system using ASP.NET and Blazor. Also built a bookstore CRUD web application with ASP.NET.
